reference: I am a fifty-nine-year-old male who experiences intense pain in both nipples whenever they get cold, which radiates through my chest. It lasts until they warm up, but strangely, I can find some relief by placing my cold hands directly on them. There is no discharge or discoloration. This is not new; it has been going on for a few years, and I have never found anything on the internet that matches my symptoms.
text: I am a 59-year-old male who experiences intense pain in both nipples whenever they get cold, which radiates through my chest. It lasts until they warm up, but strangely, I can find some relief by placing my cold hands directly on them. There is no discharge or discoloration. This is not new, it has been going on for a few years, and I have never found anything on the internet that matches my symptoms.
